reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. This is so perfect. It is my second one after wearing out ... This is so perfect. It is my second one after wearing out the first one. I rarely go to the chiropractor anymore. My son also has one. When my grandson was just a year old, he would go get the activator and bring it to his dad and point to his neck where it hurt. It can also be used on pets Review 2: rating 5.0. Flawless I've had for 4 months without a single problem. It's a great product for a fraction of the cost of the activator series Review 3: rating 5.0. works great! I bought this to treat my mule, but found me using it more and more on myself lol.

I can't make it to the chiropractor, to the masseuse etc on a regular basis with my life and work schedule. So a couple of these to the area works great.

To those that say this is a medical device and could cause permanent damage, you cannot damage yourself with this unless you ingest it.

This does not deliver a punch that would hurt someone. It merely ac... Review 4: rating 4.0. easy to use This little device helps me with days when I have pain in my neck. By making minor adjustments to the c1 and occiput, I am able to function better during the day with less pain, less drugs, and get better sleep. It is not the cure, but can help when you aren't able to meet with the chiropractor or are limited in visits due to cost. Review 5: rating 1.0. Way overpriced for what you get. Way too weak to manipulate any bones. Compared strength with my Chiropractors CAT and there is no comparison, he laughed when we compared them. For a $133.80, I would expect at least a decently made product but this is not the case here. Review 6: rating 5.0. This price was really affordable and patients are pleased with its use This is a quality chiropractic tool that is doing its job. This price was really affordable and patients are pleased with its use. The doctor is pleased that it is adjustable and as easy to use as the activators she has been using for years. Now we have a new tool to assure us that we will have the equipment that patients need. For patients that cannot have a "hands on" adjustment, this tool is great. ... Review 7: rating 5.0. A great buy! It's a life saver when it comes to loosening those tight muscles. If you get a lot of neck, shoulder or back muscle knots...this is a great little tool...even if you see a chiropractor regularly...as my family does. It never fails...the weekend hits, the chiropractor is closed, and I have a stiff neck! This little clicker will loosen it right up and make you feel like a million bucks soon after and even better the next day. A great buy! Review 8: rating 5.0. Works well and does the trick on my knees once ... Works well and does the trick on my knees once I got the Dr to show me how to use it. Review 9: rating 3.0. Great condition of the chiropractic tool although it feels kind ... Great condition of the chiropractic tool although it feels kind of wiggly and not tough enough. Other than that great product. Unimpressed with this instrument. Intensity adjustment has limited range, & most of force goes into handle. I am a chiropractic student and opted for the cheaper non-activator instrument. It works, but I am dissapointed with the devices adjustability. Review 15: rating 5.0. My new best friend! I carry this in my bag and use it daily! My new best friend! I carry this in my bag and use it daily! Review 16: rating 5.0. Five Stars My husband and I have used this multiple times! It is a God send for tensed up sore muscles! Review 17: rating 5.0. Great product This is just what I was looking for and at a reasonable price. I have several patients with arthritic joints and decreased disc spaces that make it impossible to get satisfying relief from diversified adjusting. Treatment with this tool along with deep tissue stretching and axial decompression increases mobility, decreases pain and discomfort as well as restores function. I would buy this product again in the future, if I needed to and from this seller, as service an... Review 18: rating 5.0. Easy to Use But Not on Yourself This works beautifully, but if you try to treat yourself, you will sprain your wrist. Try it with a friend. Review 19: rating 5.0. works great, great price, would buy again this is a nice tool, plenty of adjustment from a light to hard, good construction, would recommend, already bought a second one. Review 20: rating 5.0. Life changing! Bought this to use on my Golden Retriever and myself. Seems like a silly little nothing machine but WOW.. what a difference it has made in our lives. I had my chiropractor teach me how to use it. Love it!
persona: This customer prioritizes products that deliver significant practical value and effectiveness, making purchase decisions based on clear functional benefits and tangible improvements in their daily routine.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Five Stars got it, and its a major help.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great stuff! Wow, I've been paying too much to have this done at the salon! I love this... no need to draw in eyebrows everyday. The color is very natural, and it's easy to use. I would recommend to anyone looking to darken their eyebrows. Review 2: rating 3.0. Great product. Came with a lot of good stuff Great product. Came with a lot of good stuff . The product is only for brows and side burns , it didn't work for my friends mustache so I don't think it really works for that. It did worked for my eyebrows! Review 3: rating 1.0. I've ordered this before so I knew the color of the capsules were wrong. Review 4: rating 5.0. Definitely would recommend this product! I'm a blonde and it nicely dyed my eyebrows dark brown I read a lot of reviews before ordering a product so since I find them helpful I am hoping to help others with my review. I am not sure why anyone would not get good results with this product. I am a blonde so my eyebrows were barely noticeable. Almost 2 years ago I dyed my hair dark and love it but didn't like that my eyebrows didn't match. I have had my hairdresser dye them before but it... Review 5: rating 5.0. Love it!! I usually don't write reviews on amazon but this product is so worth it! I wish i had found it sooner. I struggle with very sparse, thin, never-grows-anymore brows due to overplucking. I always fill in my brows and it gets very annoying sometimes especially whenever i wake up early in the morning to go to work. It does fade but you can still tell you have brows. This stuff works so well i hope it doesn't get discontinued! The tint lasts about a week for me, i wish it lasted... Review 6: rating 5.0. this worked great. I did quite a bit of research this worked great. I did quite a bit of research, so I'll write exactly what I did below.

Before anything I washed my eyebrows with some makeup remover to ensure no gross dirt or oils were left over.

I opened the capsule over the given dish and that was in the sink to make sure nothing made a mess. I added the developer and then mixed it togtwhe and then applied it to my right eyebrow ***VERY IMPORTANT***** apply ... Review 7: rating 3.0. Some Issues I returned the 1st box which was used & had fingerprint smudges on the developer bottle. The 2nd box was fine.

Do an allergy test if you have sensitive skin. My mom did the test on her arm and woke up with the area red & puffy.

But ultimately I like this tint kit. It works well on my eyebrows. I used the method of putting on a layer, wiping it off after 30 seconds, checking, then adding another layer until I was happy with the results.

The... Review 8: rating 5.0. Very satisfied. Because of the consistency after mixing it was ... Very satisfied. Because of the consistency after mixing it was much easier to apply than I had expected. Also, it is a great buy: I was expecting this to be a one-time use product, but with 20 capsules (which means 20 applications) and a large bottle of the cream to mix them in -- I expect this product to last about a year and a half or more. Easy to use, great color, exceptional buy!
Sandra H. Review 9: rating 5.0. Five Stars I'm very satisfied with my purchase Review 10: rating 5.0. I love!! I love!!! It worked so well. I like my brows dark and prominent and I have to wear a lot of makeup to make them look that way. I left this on for about 3 minutes and then applied another light layer for another minute. My eyebrows look great and I'm so happy with the results. 10/10 Review 11: rating 1.0. This application is "Dark Brown" Review 15: rating 1.0. Stressful! Turned clients eyebrows green..old product...set me back an hour! Thanks! Review 16: rating 1.0. not impressed I would not buy it again Review 17: rating 1.0. Never works One night, I've tried it 4 times which made the skin under my brows irritating for over a week, but it did not tint the skin at all. I've tried a few more times after that, but never worked. Review 18: rating 5.0. Works good for filling in sparse eyebrows I was hoping that this product would be like the tattoo eyebrow products that last for a few days after applying (from reading the reviews). The skin dying fades after about one day. It is also hard to create a nice eyebrow shape with this product. The dye is a light creamy brown when mixed so you can't really see where the product is on the skin when you apply it. So when I finished dying, my eyebrows were super thick, uneven and ugly. I'm g... Review 19: rating 5.0. Looks very natural and very easy to use Looks very natural and very easy to use. I recommend building the color up slowly by reapplying it a couple of times in short periods of time vs leaving it on for a long time. I mix the batch and complete one brow at a time for best color control. I apply the tint to one brow, leave it on for 1 minute. Wipe it off and adjust the tint where more color is needed. After the first minute, the second and third applications are only left on for 30sec... Review 20: rating 5.0. Great tint for eyebrows Wow is this easy to use! I left on my brows one minute for starters and ended up with 1.5 minutes working best. So fast and easy to tint. It's been two weeks, and I haven't noticed any fading. I had to contact the company as the Amazon distributor left out the developer. They sent me a replacement bottle very quickly and were very pleasant to talk to. I'd highly recommend this product.
persona: This customer values effective, long-lasting results and is willing to adjust application techniques beyond instructions to achieve their desired outcome, prioritizing performance and customization over strict adherence to product guidelines.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Really Good, would be 5 stars if it lasted longer. This tint is really good. I have on a scale from very fair to very dark, I have dark skin so In order to get this tint as dark as I need to I need to leave it on 20 minutes believe it or not. The suggestion and directions say 5-6 minutes for darker, but most of it wipes off. If you want darker brows youre going to have to throw out the directions and wipe and reapply to your liking. I also have very sparse brows, however my sister does not and I found it required less time to get her brows darker too. like 10-14 minutes. I think it takes me longer because I shape the tint like I would "drawing on" my brows so Its dying my skin at one point. The tint begins to wear off after 3 days (this is with me avoiding washing my brows or applying moisturizers) and I would say by day 5 it's almost completely gone. So if you like the look you will have to maintain it. 4 stars because I wish it would last longer.

persona: This customer values effective performance and functionality in hair care products, prioritizing cleanliness, softness, and detangling over fragrance or price, and is willing to pay for high-quality, reliable results, though they are sensitive to sizing accuracy and may be influenced by past product experiences.
reference_output: rating 3.0. Smells good but not as great as I remember and they are smal... I didn't read the description on the sizes as good as I should have. These are pretty small so I don't consider this a good price. I would have if they had been the larger sizes I used to see in the stores. This looks like the $1.99 size. I like the smell but for some reason,  it's not as intoxicating and fresh as I remember. Either the formula has changed, I've  changed, or I should have sprung for the perfume instead of the body spray. I'm wearing it but not loving it as much as I thought...and I again I think these are a little I overpriced for the sizes of the cans. I get that everything has gone up but Windsong was never a "premium" fragrance. It was always simple, affordable and fresh, without all the complex notes of pricier fragrances.

rating 5.0. If you battle with dry eyes, you need this Ever since my cataract operation, I have been experiencing what I would call chronic dry eyes. My ophthalmologist tells me that this can happen to some people after the procedure and suggested that I try soaking a facecloth in hot water and using it as a hot compress for about five minutes to help alleviate the problem.

Well, needless to say that facecloths don't stay hot for long, so using a compress wasn't an option. Then, I bought this eye mask and it solved my problem. Twenty seconds in the microwave and it stays comfortably hot for about ten minutes without a problem. I use it morning and night and best of all, no more dry eyes.

persona: This customer values innovative, visually striking product features such as 3D effects and color-shifting properties, and is willing to purchase complementary accessories separately to achieve desired results; they prioritize aesthetic impact and creative expression over price or convenience.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Very cool effects Where do I start to describe the dimensions of this nail polish?!  I've attached 4 pictures, 2 in natural light and 2 in the artificial light of my bathroom.  In artificial light, you can really see the 3D effects. In natural light, the chameleon color shift really shows. You get 6 colors in the set, all beautiful.  This set does not come with the magnet but, I already had one so it was no big deal. First,  I polished all my nails with a black base color, 2 coats, and I let it dry thoroughly. I found it was best to work with one nail at a time. Give the bottle a good shake each and every time just before you apply it to the nail. That way, the magnetic particles stay mixed because they tend to settle to the bottom of the bottle quickly.  After applying one coat, hold the magnet as close as possible to the nail for about 30 seconds. Then, apply your favorite top coat and hold the magnet over your nail for another 30 seconds before moving on to the next nail. The effects are gorgeous! Love these!

reference_output: rating 3.0. No huge impact :| The cost was reasonable, and it arrived quickly and was easy to apply. However, I was bummed to see no noticeable impact on the strength or thickness of my nails after using this. I'm an anxious nail bite-er, and sometimes I can go quite awhile without any issue but then BAM! all my nails are gone and my nail beds are bleeding. Its embarrassing, and I generally will cover it with acrylic nails while they heal and grow out. However, my nail shop is not in business yet, so I thought to try this. When my nails are healthy, I have strong, clear, straight nails (I don't have damage due to acrylics); so I had a bit of expectation that I would get closer to that with this product. Nope. Not much different from your average top coat.

reference_output:
rating 5.0. This just might be the lash serum of my dreams. I just got this a couple of weeks ago and didn't start using it right away. I'd gotten out of the routine of using lash serum, so I had to remind myself to use it. Well, now that I've been using it consistently, I can honestly say it's at least as good as the high priced serums I'd used in the past (Revitalash and Latisse). My lashes are already starting to show the results. It's a record. With prior products, I had to wait much longer to see visible growth. I can actually feel them touching my eyelids when I blink.

As an aesthetician, I make recommendations on lash products to my clients (especially those who get lash extensions, whether they suffer from traction alopecia or not). I'm not going to have any problem recommending this product. The ingredients are top notch.

4. Apply thin coat of no wipe gel top coat and cure for 30 secs

persona: This customer values secure, individually sealed packaging and trusts Amazon’s fulfillment process, prioritizing product integrity and freshness over scent preferences, and is willing to pay a fair price for a reliably packaged, high-quality sanitizer.
reference_output:
rating 5.0. Very great sanitizer if the scent and price are ok with you. I'm extremely satisfied with how newly this sanitizer was packed and sealed, it was shipped and sold by Amazon, maybe that is why! I already bought this sanitizer from Ulta and main site but I don't see they seal each mini bottle by plastic individually this way. This is a plus point for Amazon.
About the sanitizer, I know many people complain about its scent. Luckily, I already used the body lotion which is in same line with this sanitizer and has same scent, so at first when hearing too many complaints about the scent, I was not afraid much to try. Also, I like the design of this sanitizer bottle, it's square, cute with flip top cap which is very convenient to bring with you anywhere when you go out. I have tried lots of sanitizer brands during pandemic time, for me, I feel this is a very good sanitizer because it's creamy, thick but not greasy, dries very fast but doesn't make your hands dry at all, very comfortable after using and smells great (for me). The only thing that matters is the price. To be honest, for this size 66ml and more than $6 is too overpricing compared with same size sanitizers from other brands, even top brands like Purell or Safeguard. That's why I love it but I only bought 3 bottles as a big support from me to Hempz company and that's all. I would buy a whole box of this if I were a very rich girl as it's what I like, but my pocket will cry... So... Bye for now till I become much richer, lol...
Good job Amazon and Hempz.

persona: This customer values ease of use and reliable results in at-home nail applications, preferring products that simplify the process and deliver professional-looking outcomes without requiring advanced skill or precision.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Perfect Nails This is the one of the best products for those that do their own nails at home and are not very good with applying acrylic freestyle.  Just mix your acrylic onto the brush and pat it into the nail form, once that is done, turn the form over and press it onto your own nail and hold.  Scrap any access of from sides, wait approx. 3 mins. until acrylic hardens, then pull the form off.  You will have a beautiful smooth acrylic nail and all that is left to do is just file the sides to shape the way you want.  Love, Love this product.

persona: This customer prioritizes product effectiveness and authenticity, especially for sensitive concerns like excessive sweating or skin tone matching, and is willing to experiment with complementary products to achieve desired results, but is highly sensitive to unpleasant odors and inaccurate color representation.
reference_output:
rating 1.0. Does NOT work and smells like a meth lab First off, I sweat so bad that I don’t look like I’m wearing any makeup by the time I leave my home, and in the summertime, it feels like I’m sitting in a jacuzzi with my clothes on… So, it was really important for this stuff to work. Unfortunately, this antiperspirant smells like a combination of formaldehyde and a meth lab … and I know because I tried using this stuff on my face to treat excessive sweating (due to fibromyalgia), but it only kind of worked for a 1 or 2 days, but not in a row. So it’s not reliable. Plus, it leaves your skin dry and terribly itchy!
Which REALLY SUCKS, considering how expensive it is for such a small amount of “antiperspirant”.

In short, I don’t recommend it.

persona: This customer prioritizes high-performance, traditionally formulated shaving products with superior lathering and slickness, values natural ingredients like tallow and lanolin, and seeks a premium post-shave experience over convenience or low cost.
reference_output: rating 5.0. A must-have for any wet shaver! Right out of the gate, Mitchell's Wool Fat is an amazing shaving soap!  It lathers up well (not any trickier than other tallow-based soaps), clean/mild scent (a classic Ivory/bar soap type smell), protective & very slick!  The slickness is definitely one of my favorite attributes of MWF.  Tallow soaps are generally known for their glide, but the addition of the lanolin in Mitchell's takes it to another level.  The post-shave feel with this soap is hands down the best I've experienced.  Some of my other products are certainly going to sit around now that MWF is in the picture.  Do yourself a favor & add this to your wet shaving stash asap; you won't be disappointed!

reference_output: rating 5.0. Lasts and lasts I have atomic pink. I lightened my dark blonde hair to lightest blond and this is so bright! It also glows in a black light. This is THE best pink I have ever used and I have used many. Ion, manic panic, Pravana and any other pink I can find. This is it!. I've had this in my hair for months now and only have had to retouch the regrowth a few times and comb through refresh a little. This stays. Everything else I tried would be gone in a week. Not this. It will stay until I bleach it out, so be warned if you are looking for temporary. This is permanent and I am thrilled. I use this and Pravana Vivids Violet for my purple and I never have to worry about faded out hair anymore. The blonde in the photo is how light I bleached my naturally medium blonde hair before applying this color. The photo is the pink after I colored over some of it with purple and retouched 3 months ago! This is 3 month old color!!!! I don't even wash in cold or use any special conditioner. I cannot rave about this pink and the Pravana Violet enough. Now if I can find a teal this good I'll be in heaven.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Very good I have something called Horner's Syndrome, it's some kind of crazy bizarre nerve damage in which part of my face is really dry and doesn't perspire and other areas perspire way too much. Crazy. It also makes one pupil appear small and the other is noticeably larger, so creepy, but the product can't do anything to help me with that. I decided to try this Mehron Skin Prep Pro, to see how well it could help me with the areas that perspire too much. I poured out a very small amount onto a stainless steel makeup palette that I have and decided to use an eye shadow brush to apply it, I only apply the Skin Prep only to parts of my face that have always had the problem. Generally, I start to apply my makeup and need to stop 3-4 times during process to gently blot the same 4 overly sweaty sections, lightly dust powder, sit with a fan, think breezy thoughts, etc. I was careful not to paint the Skin Prep on the alternate, dry areas, those areas do not perspire and can develop a parched, peely appearance. I waited a few seconds for the Skin Prep to dry on my face before continuing with my makeup. I've only used it 4 times so far, but, touch wood, it seems to be working. My makeup has had a more even application and appearance, even before I was done putting makeup on, I feel like my tone was more even and looked better. When it comes to the mirror, we notice things in so much greater detail than anyone else ever would, I realize no one else may ever notice the difference I notice. It certainly has helped a bit with my bizarre harlequin sweaty vs dry issue I've got going, even if no one else ever notices it, that little improvement means something to me.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Simple & gentle everyday cleanser For reference: My skin type is combination/oily and acne prone. I rarely get cystic acne (though I have in the past with the scars to prove it), but I get a lot of whiteheads and clogged pores around my cheeks, jawline, chin, and edges of my mouth.I have used the Purity by Philosophy cleanser for the last few years because it never lets me down. It's gentle, doesn't sting my eyes, and removes all my excess makeup. But it is expensive and as I began developing my own k-beauty skin care routine, I was looking for a gentle foaming cleanser that was more affordable. This Good Morning cleanser is perfect for everyday. I currently only use it in the morning because I still have more than half a bottle of the Purity left, which I use in the PM. But once my purity runs out, I look forward to using the CosRX cleanser both AM & PM. It foams really nicely and my skin doesn't feel excessively dry or tight after usage. It has a very light and pleasant medicinal smell.

persona: This customer prioritizes product fit and ergonomic design that aligns with their unique physical needs, values functionality and comfort in use, and is willing to invest time in mastering the product despite a learning curve, indicating a preference for tools that deliver precise, personalized results over generic, one-size-fits-all solutions.
reference_output: rating 4.0. The good, the bad and the ugly... My review consists of the good, the bad and the ugly. First,the good - I finally found a curler that 'fits' my eyelid. Huh, you say? Well, it appears that most of the manufacturers believe I have golf balls instead of human eyes. The tool's shape is long and shallow enough of a curve to catch most of the eyelashes. It is comfortable to use, but takes a bit of practice. Once you are comfortable with the scissor motion (sorry, no other way to describe it) used to make the curl, you are rewarded with a nice, non-crimpy curl. The pad in this one is the best I have used. This tool also opens wide enough that even the most nearsighted or lush lashed amoungst us can get it close to the base of the upper lashes. The design over all is very well thought out. I recommend using an magnifying mirror if you have to use bifocals (I do). All that said, now...the bad - there is no replacement pad and I am questioning how sanitary this is going to be in the long run. I agree completely with folks here who advise to REMOVE ALL EYE MAKEUP before use. Ain't nothing pretty about an eye infection. I am wondering out loud how to properly clean this curler to be certain it remains safe. If you are prone to sties and other types of infection, I would be asking the same questions. Which leads to...the ugly - until you practice and are used to it (won't take long) the results are a bit odd looking. The black pad is plushier and looks to be made of silicone and not the usual hard rubber. I have found that the hard rubber pads are chiefly responsible for that weird ugly crimp you can get. Not so with this one. I mentioned before the squeezy scissor action your thumb and index finger have to use can be tricky. If you have coordination issues, well - things could get ugly.SUGGESTIONS for use...wash your hands before use. I keep the little plastic clip to keep the tool closed. You could follow the advise of one person here to heat the tool with a dryer, but I think I may skip that. Use a makeup mirror to assist you. Practice when you have some time. Enjoy, Ladies - get out there and be lovely.

As far as comfort it's just ok. I am a professional manicurist and comfort matters too. There should be a cushion to place an elbow on it and then would be perfect.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Highly recommend. Hands down the best dust collector I have ever bought. This doesn’t do anything for fumes, but that’s not an issue for me. Review 17: rating 5.0. Chips easy. Apply more than 1 coat and add a top coat Love!! 30 bottles of FULL SIZED nail polish. I took them out of container and kept plastic stand because it holds bottles up right to keep them from falling over in my cabinet

Review 18: rating 5.0. Definitely recommend I bought this on a whim and I'm very pleased I did. The package was completely intact when it arrived. I use a gel top coat and it lasts as long as the Sally Hanson miracle gel polish. It didn't chip at all the first day. I worked a 9 hour shift (I work in retail) and I did a bunch of dishes. I do my nails twice a week typically and it totally held up until i had a chance to do them again (4 days).My package had a lot of darker colors, which is perfect for me. Th...

Review 20: rating 5.0. Great buy! I'm looking forward to using this polish! I didn't have any broken, dried out or half full bottles. The crackle polish is not marked in the bottle but the packaging is. Over all, I'm pleased with the purchase.
persona: This customer is highly value-driven, prioritizing low price and exceptional perceived value, and appreciates thoughtful packaging and organization that enhances usability and storage convenience.
reference_output: rating 5.0. To summarize, the price alone makes them worth it! Came in yesterday.  Well cushioned in bubble wrap. Then in 5 tubes of 6 ea. Finally inside convenient storage trays with individual slots (works for me!) Not likely to break.The colors really are wonderful! Can’t speak for durability having not yet worn any. I’m hoping 2 regular or a gel topcoat will help them last?? If not, great for learning practice for someone? At $20. for 30 full size bottles! What a deal!!Polish was separated so before trying, I wore my shoulder out shaking & laying them on all sides between shakes.I’m not familiar with fractured polish, so just guessing the 3 streaked examples should have been shaken more?? They are the first ones I used. Each (only those) have a white base and one slightly heavy polish coat... they fracture on contact!The other colors are 2 thin coats and all 30 have topcoats. Although a few are very similar in color, no 2 are exactly the same.  Not complaining mind you but In a perfect world I would exchange a couple look a-likes for a Christmasy green, & a good clear glitter, possibly black (I think) to complete the set😉I hope this info helps you decide if you want!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Five Stars Nice quality and look good on my bathroom counter

Review 2: rating 5.0. As expected I use these for witch hazel in the bathrooms.  It makes it easy to dispense and I would say it reduces waste.  Usually only need two pumps per cotton round. Would recommend.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Works as Designed I would prefer glass bottles (these are plastic), but they dispense my face cleanser and eye makeup remover perfectly.  Just what I needed.

Review 4: rating 1.0. Damage product One bottle works the second did not and they don’t accept returns or exchange

Review 5: rating 5.0. Perfect size and easy to use Works well, looks nice on my vanity and exactly as advertised. I couldn't find these in the stores, Amazon had them and the price seemed pretty good for a pair.  Easy to use with one hand and the size is just right - I use them for storing/dispensing witch hazel and toner.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Decluttered Vanity very nicely! These great dispensers are pretty and work perfectly.  Water tight lids are perfect for watery liquids. If there is any leftover liquid after dispensing,  it slowly drips back into the bottle.  I use these for witch hazel, however, I would not recommend for use with Creams and lotions.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Great solution to a discontinued product. I have used the Windex Touch Up Pumps in my bathrooms for quick cleanups. Unfortunately, they discontinued the product and the pump bottles are not refillable. I was getting a pedicure recently and the cosmetologist used a bottle like this for nail polish remover. Lightbulb moment: I can fill them with windex and keep one in each bathroom to replace the touch up pumps that I used to buy. I have to fill these bottles more frequently but in the...

Review 8: rating 5.0. Works great looks great I bought these to put makeup remove and toner in. They’re pretty big and make it super convenient to get product out. They look really nice on my counter and work great.

Review 9: rating 2.0. Don't run them through the dishwasher! I liked them when I first got them, but I wanted to sanitize them before I used them, so I put them on the top shelf of my dishwasher. That was a mistake. They warped.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Great looking bottles, but... Item arrived damaged. I don’t think it was packed properly.

Review 11: rating 1.0. Not a good match for acetone I bought this to use with 100% acetone nail polish remover. The first problem was that one pump was insufficient to soak a cotton swab enough to take off polish, but a second pump would cause the acetone to spurt all over. This lead to a second problem, which was the spilled acetone would then drop down the outside of the bottle and stain/cloud it. Ultimately, I replaced this with a glass bottle with a steel pump.

Review 12: rating 5.0. Great quality Bought for my facial water.  I love them, I only needed one but a back up is always a bonus

Review 13: rating 1.0. Waste of money I bought these to use to dispense mineral spirits and denatured alcohol in my woodworking shop. I figured that if they could be used with acetone nail polish remover, they would certainly hold up for the less volatile solutions above. In both cases, they worked the first time I used them on the first day. But the next day, both of them where frozen so that the pump would not spring back to allow the liquid to be dispensed. I couldn't even get them to pop back out by pu...

Review 14: rating 5.0. Great for nail stuff and face toners These are perfect for alcohol and acetone for manicures, facial toners, etc. the only thing I’d say is be careful with certain chemicals because the bottle I have with acetone seems to be breaking down a bit compared to the one with rubbing alcohol. I think the plastics used just don’t work the best with pure acetone, but everything else I’ve put in it has worked great and hasn’t leaked at all.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Great product! I love these wipes and all L. products! I never used wipes before but these leave me feeling clean and refreshed...much better than just using toilet paper. What makes it even better is knowing that it is completely organic. I plan to use them while traveling and camping which I am really excited for.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Great product! Great quality and scent Amazing product. Smell is great and the quality is amazing. Definitely going to buy again! (Bought on my husbands account haha!)

Review 3: rating 5.0. Beautiful, Soft, Fresh and Moisturizing Extra soft, super fresh and moisturizing! I typically get baby wipes as they are softer but these are cheaper than other organic brands and the packaging is cute! I can leave them sitting out since they arent an eye sore like most wipe packages. I highly recommend.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Subtle fragrance and gentle.......... Just when I was about to give up on wipes altogether due to the fact I break out even on sensitive ones, and most of the big name brands always feel slimy.  These were incredible, they were perfect wipes and I'm so glad I discovered them.  I just placed a second order and I will continue to buy these for as long as I need them.  Great product!!!

Review 5: rating 3.0. tears easily Overall, these are nice because I know that they're safe to use in sensitive areas. However, they tear very easily, and they're small, so I generally need to use 2-3 to get the utility out of them that I'm seeking.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Great for sensitive people! I love the whole L. line of products because I seem to have issues with many other brands in the area of feminine hygiene. These are a pleasant smell with good durability and a convenient, reclosable pouch. I don't have any issues "down there" when using them and would recommend this to anyone.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Not your average wipe - thank goodness! I just bought the L. pads for my daughter and figured I would add these to the cart.  We don't typically "do" wipes in our house - not even for makeup, because I don't want the harmful chemicals hurting any of us.  These are a healthier option though (thank you L.) and sometimes it's just really nice to be able to freshen up without a full blown shower.  The packaging is nice and they have a fresh clean scent to them that is pleasing.  Happy I ...

Review 8: rating 1.0. Caused a yeast infection I am pretty sure these gave me a yeast infection. The only time I have ever gotten them was when I took antibiotics, but the only thing I have done differently is use these wipes.

Review 9: rating 5.0. Refreshing and Healing Lady Wipes - Best New Product I've Bought These are the best. I am astounded at the healing factor and lack of prickly pain when used.Worth every penny you pay. Try them.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Love it I really like them ordering again it has a really clean feeling I choose wipes over toilet paper any day smells really good

Review 11: rating 5.0. Excellent I like that there isn't any ingredients that aren't really identified or that you can't pronounce. The scentn is pleasant but neutral. I have fairly sensitive skin, and these are really great at gently cleansing the areas that need it.I keep a packet in the bathroom, and a packet in my purse.Also, I love that they support girls & women less fortunate.

Review 12: rating 5.0. Simply the best! Great to use after the gym if you don't have time to shower. Or if you just aren't feeling all that fresh down there and need a quick little cleanse!

Review 13: rating 4.0. Good These wipes are fresh and durable, but smaller than some other brands. I find it frustrating that you have to reach into the pouch every single time you need to pull out another wipe; they don't connect or come out sequentially as they should. These are also quite expensive, so I will probably not buy again.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Clean wipes I used a popular brand of wipes that left me with an awful itch! I’m so glad to find these beautiful wipes-all my symptoms have disappeared

Review 15: rating 5.0. Fresh feeling Soft, good size, strong, flushable & fresh fragrance. Due to a medical condition I frequently urinate. These cloths keep me fresh all day.

Review 16: rating 5.0. perfect wipes these are the best wipes i have ever used. no fragrancebut do the job. i will reorder them for sure when these are gone.

Review 17: rating 4.0. Awesome but packaging sucks I love that product, it smells good, it's natural, great for refreshing. But it is a pain to take the wipes out!! They come all at once so then I put them back inside the bag in a ball and just use that Technic since they stuck together. I have another pack of wipes that comes out perfectly from another brand so it's possible to make it work. It drives me nuts so I won't buy that otherwise good product anymore.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Smooth Clean and smoothDo not dry your skin!! Will buy these products agaim

Review 19: rating 5.0. The best Wipes! Not usually leaving reviews but these wipes blow me away. I feel so "fresh" after using the and the scent is simply amazing. 30 in a packets is also a bonus, compared to many other brands that only have 10 in a packet. Super-easy to remove 1 wipe at a time. persona: This customer values fast shipping and product effectiveness, willing to pay a premium for convenience and reliability, and prioritizes timely delivery over cost, especially when purchasing high-quality nail polish.
reference_output: rating 1.0. I WANTED to like these but... These just don't work well...  In theory, I LOVE them, but the acetone evaporates before gel polish will dissolve... I'd buy the silicone "Soakies" instead and see if those do a better job at preventing the evaporation.  I haven't used these on regular nail polish because it comes off so easily anyway... so, If they don't last long enough to dissolve gels, I can't endorse them... I also tried wrapping the fingers in foils and using a regular thick cotton round ( both cut and folded).  Still, the acetone evaporated before the gel was coming off... and the very thin pads included wouldn't work AT ALL... I even took a bottle of acetone, warmed it  (carefully) in a pan of hot water & soaked cotton pads, wrapped fingers in foils & continually re-wetted with additional acetone... THAT finally worked, but by that point, I could have just done it without the clips.  And, for self-use they are less than worthless...  trying to get them on and keep working is comedic. Additionally, a lot of toes won't fit at all because the clips just aren't large enough.

Review 1: rating 4.0. Smells good.  I reckon that's the point... I'm on this crazy nostalgia kick so I figured I'd try one of the oldest colognes/perfumes (it's unisex, ya know) around.  Gotta say, this has a very pleasant smell and is not overpowering at all.  In fact, if anything, it might fade just a tad too quickly for some.  It's cheap.  Give it a try!

Review 2: rating 5.0. This stuff is great I use this Florida Water during our hot Louisiana summers while playing golf.  We also use it at the course when we host other clubs and everyone really enjoys the refreshing, cooling effects it gives.  I just wish it was a different scent.  The smell is a bit strong.  I have used other products like this that were fruity smelling which is better for me.  I do highly recommend this stuff....just don't use too much of it.  It will take your breath away.

Review 3: rating 5.0. No Zombies!! My luck has improved, and I haven't seen a zombie in months...

I checked Amazon and they carried it, and it wasn't expensive so I thought "why not?"  I'd never heard of it, and my Dad was from Florida (same age range and Lucille Ball and Dezi Arnez) so thought I'd give it a whirl.  The bottle sort of mentions it has some mild medicinal qualities if sprayed in a room.  I haven't tried that ou...

Review 5: rating 4.0. Chicks dig it Really dig this stuff. Every time I smell it I think I'm on an episode of Miami Vice.

Personally, I like douse my pillows and blankets with it more than wear it on my body.  I like it a lot but it's not a substitute for perfume or cologne.

The smell is great and hasn't caused any allergy issue with anyone.  The smell doesn't last for ever but that is not that big of an issue with me.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. It works!  Non-kink oxygen tubing. People who depend on portable oxygen will know how difficult it can be to find tubing which does not "kink"--tangling in on itself, blocking the air-flow, and really becoming a nuisance.  The manufacturers of this product describe it as "non-kink" and they tell the truth.  It is refreshing to find tubing which behaves itself, even when extended to the maximum medically recommended length of 50'.  When, after a while, it does begin to tangle, it's ti...

Review 2: rating 4.0. Good quality I like to change out my hose often - I can get free ones from my medical provider but the quality of this one is much better - fewer tangles and fewer problems and that's a good thing. I'll keep buying these.

Review 3: rating 4.0. good item I like this item was exactly as described the only problem was I had was is still a little excessive in the tangled up area. I truly believe is more my fault the air hose

Review 4: rating 2.0. It's cheap and works It's a great price but not the quality I was looking for. It kinks easily and isn't as thick as higher quality tubing. It does work just a little of a hassle when rolling it up and you have to be careful to lay it out so it won't kink on you.

Review 5: rating 2.0. green? its not that the tubbing does not work it does. but i did not want green.and no wherewas it listed that it might come in that color.for if it did i would not of ordered it. does any oneeven wonder how this effects a person who is on oxygen?i think not.

Review 6: rating 1.0. Won't get this again if I don't have to Too narrow a gauge for starters, crushes enough to obliterate flow with the least pressure, and kinks and knots up like crazy even though I'm using swivel connectors. Starts to stiffen up at as high as 60 degrees F and I hate to think what it will be like when it's exposed to even colder temps come Fall and Winter months. If you have the choice to not buy this, don't.

Review 7: rating 3.0. gets caught on everything i need to use the o2 24/7 and the tubing goes with me wherever i go. it seems to get caught on all the furniture. wish there was a larger tubing.

Review 8: rating 1.0. Poor Quality This tubing is very poor quality. It is yellowish I color and looks aged. It is also thin walled and kinks very easily, so much so that I had to discard it. Would not recommend unless you like throwing money away.

Review 9: rating 4.0. American Bantex Hose Does It's Job Product was wrapped and coiled neatly. Had no problems with hooking it up. I will continue to use this style of tubing due to ease in use and availability.

Review 10: rating 2.0. Worry free oxygen tubing Having been on oxygen 24/7 for 5 years now, I have always had difficulty with the tubing kinking. This product said it did not kink so I bought it. Sadly, it does kink, not as bad as the other, but you realy must keep a close eye on it.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Sturdy tubing My mom is on oxygen and needed longer tubing for her large machine. This gave her a lot of freedom around the house and even to go outside

I have pulmonary hypertension and need high flow and this tubing does not deliver.

Review 19: rating 4.0. This is much better at reducing the tangles As mentioned, our provider only offers the green tubing now.  This is much better at reducing the tangles.

Review 20: rating 5.0. Five Stars glad I found this non-kink oxygen tubing- it's great
persona: This customer values product quality, aesthetic appeal, and reliable customer service, and is willing to pay for items that offer good value and thoughtful presentation, particularly when they align with personal interests or serve as meaningful gifts.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Good hose unless you have cats This is a decent quality hose that stands up well to normal use going around the house for a constant oxygen wearer. I will say that if you have cats that like to paw at things that move or chew, they do fall victim to that pretty hardcore and will need replacing. And then from the EMT point of view, there's always the fact that when you filter oxygen down 50ft of hose, you're not getting the high-quality oxygen you're looking for, nor are you getting the pressure you have your concentrator set on by the time it travels that far to reach you. But the hose itself is good for the money you pay for it, and mom is happy with hers, so will probably be ordering some more.

It doesn't transfer to the hair while brushing thankfully, but I get a whiff of it every time I pick it up to use it. I can handle it but I don't have any allergies or a super-sensitive nose, other's may find it too much to bear.

It is very smoothing and works to distribute the oils. Seems like a quality brush, though hard to use. It MAY grow on me.

Review 15: rating 1.0. Doesn't replace a strip lash - doesn't follow lash line If you are used to using a strip lash you understand that there must be curvature for the lash to properly follow your lash line. These go on "straight" so they do not curve to your eye/lash line. Also the magnet of one popped of when I was trying to use it so now they don't work but they were no good anyway. If you are not used to doing make up this might work for you for one night but if you are good at your make up an...

Review 16: rating 1.0. Horrible! Received these today and the container they are in was all scratched and damaged on the outside. Review 17: rating 1.0. Magnets on wrong! One side of the lashes worked fine after i was able to figure out which tops went with which bottoms. On the other side, the inner lashes DID NOT WORK! The magnets were ON BACKWARDS! super annoying.

Review 18: rating 1.0. I got the type that only cover the outside of ... I got the type that only cover the outside of your eyelids and they were square cut so I had to trim them to be tapered. Review 19: rating 4.0. These only go about halfway and so it looks funny if you have sparce inner lashes like me Would give them a five star rating but... They last a while, but you will probably have to purchase another set if you plan to use them daily.

Review 20: rating 2.0. I cannot get these things to work properly. I ... I cannot get these things to work properly.  I have tried and tried and they just don't look right. reviews:
Review 1: rating 3.0. Maybe a little harsh... My previous review was pretty scathing, so I'm going to revise it a bit here.1) It's still true - after 4 applications, I've gotten nowhere with the Bare Balm as far as removing pubic hair.  Interestingly enough, I accidentally removed some of my leg hair with the product in the process of working on the package.  So the stuff does work, just not if you've got heavy, coarse hair down there.2) Customer service did finally get back to me - apparently there was a...

Review 2: rating 3.0. Remove product doesn't work as well. Lotion however is great Remove product doesn't work as well. Lotion however is great!I'm giving 3 stars because of the lotion but im fairly disappointed that the removal cream doesn't work as I thought it would.It removes hair but not all of them.Nair Extra Strength seems to be a stronger and better product then this one.Not to mention this product is highly overpriced i paiy 5 dollars for Nair 10 oz

Review 3: rating 2.0. Rather use my wife's Veet... Even when you follow the instructions (wash the area, apply a thick layer, wait less than 15 minutes, "jump in a lukewarm shower", remove gently with a washcloth) it doesn't work as expected.I tried it first in my chest, and even when I'm not a hairy guy I decided to trim it down with scissors. In my first session I left it for 10 minutes and it did a pretty mediocre job, so I reapplied it and waited for 15 minutes more. To make the story short, I ended u...

Review 4: rating 1.0. Prepared my hair for shaving, little else. I've been using this product now for a few weeks and have had poor results.  With each use, I've applied a generous amount on the areas I wanted to see hair removal.  The first time I used it, I left it on for 10 minutes.  Very little, if any, hair came out.  It should also be noted that the hairy area had been trimmed maybe two weeks prior, so I started out with my hair already under pretty decent control.The second time I left it on for 12...

Review 5: rating 1.0. Not good. Didn't really work at all. First time i used it worked worse than shaving lots of stubble. i followed the instructions. Second time didnt remove any hair and i left it on for 15 mins. im sure i applyed enough. the nair for men works much better.

Review 6: rating 3.0. Solid product for some I don't love this product. Good for sensitive skin areas with fine hair. The quick breakdown:The hair remover smells better and is much gentler than other products. Using as directed it removed most hair readily. The only problem is that if you have very coarse hair on "sensitive" areas the directions say not to exceed 16 min. This didn't quite do the trick; it simply left the hair brittle, matted, damaged, and blonde.  I plan on trying again later and waiting ...

Review 7: rating 2.0. Process takes too much time, Doesn't work that well I bought this product a couple of weeks ago and wanted to try it as soon as I received it. For me, it did not work as well as others have noted.Some of the main problems that I have with this is that it takes too much time for it to work and doesn't work very well. I tried it on my legs because I thought it would be the best place to start with since the hair is not too thick and I would be able to spread it out fairly even. At firs...

Review 8: rating 4.0. Packaging I really like the product and it works well. I do have two minor complaints though. First, this stuff smells terrible, its very chemically. Second, this does not come in the standard Amazon box. It comes in a package that says Balls Balm on the front. Just be aware incase you are getting this shipped somewhere like work or something. My roommates got a good laugh at me gettin "Ball Cream" as they put it.

Review 9: rating 4.0. Works Great, ON THE SECOND ATTEMPT! I had already trimmed my scrotum and applied a generous portion of Bare Balm to it.  I waited 15 minutes, the maximum it said to wait, and jumped in the shower and rinsed off the family jewels.  To my dismay, I noticed that it didn't appear ...

Review 10: rating 4.0. Great...but smelly. First off let me say that this is the first hair removal product I have used and I am 90% pleased. Which is why I gave the Balls 4 stars. The only thing that is holding the product back from 5 stars is the rotten egg smell. Now I was expecting this because I read the reviews and I know it's a chemically based product but it kind of blew me away when I first smelled it.Also, Balls is pretty messy if you live in a college dorm like I do. You have to cover up with a ...

Review 11: rating 1.0. Does not work at all Do not waste any time or money on this product. Does not work at all. Hair is not removed. Anywhere.

Review 12: rating 2.0. Doesn't remove hair This stuff stinks and does not seem to remove much hair. Nair (womens stuff) seems to work much better and you can pick it up at Target. This stuff is more gimicky and probably meant as a funny gift.

Review 13: rating 5.0. Works as advertised Product worked well for me. I have coarse hair and left the product on for 15 minutes, at least 80% of the hair was removed. After the second application at a later time the product worked great, nothing left. I typically have sensitive skin and had no issues. Any of these kinds of creams have a bad smell but I did not think this was any worse than nair. The included lotion works well and I will definitely purchase this product again.

Review 14: rating 2.0. didnt work ill adimt, im half monkey, but thats why i looked to find this type of product.  i used it on my back, my chest and my arms, and well...  anyway, it didnt seem to work.  if you have light amounts of body hair, and just want a clean look, maybe this will work for you.  if you have thick body hair, dont expect much!!

Review 15: rating 4.0. The Bare Pair I received my order in a couple of days, very fast. Yes I would recommend this product if you are tired of shaving your stuff. I have also sent questions to the company and had very fast reply. The only thing I don't like is the smell of the first one you use, but it goes away. I'm looking forward to the new product coming out the first of the year because of the new smell. Thanks BallsBalm !!

Review 16: rating 5.0. Hirsute men can rejoice I'm a member of the Perennially Hairy Club.  I have coarse hair all over which, while indicative of my inherently virile nature, is a bit of a put off for women who've been weened on celebrity lady-boys.  I've searched (in vain) for a product that does what it advertises, and does it without making me want to scrape my skin off.  The Bare Pair delivers.  First, it's got a completely inoffensive smell which is kinda nice considering that you have to wear the st...

Review 4: rating 2.0. it's meant for men, not women. my nail ... it's meant for men, not women.  my nail beds are natuarlly curved instead of flat.  after i put my nails in and applied small pressure, layer of my nails are peeled off before it's getting cut.

Review 5: rating 4.0. He has used them a few times now and really likes how sturdy they are Bought these for my youngest child who was always complaining that he could never find any nail clippers when needed.  I didn't tell him I bought them so when the package arrived I just handed him the clippers and said that they were his.  He chuckled and said thanks.  He has used them a few times now and really likes how sturdy they are, he says he can use them and not feel as if he is going to break them.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Nice design! Nice well-balanced design.  Solid and sharp with wide opening.  Work great!

Review 7: rating 2.0. Not good Cuts cleanly. The end of the clipper is too bulky to get underneath the nail to get a "bite". This product will only be useful to you if you want to cut nails that are grown out long and you don't want them clipped close.I modified them to work better. (see customer images before and after)

Review 8: rating 5.0. super quality clippers Woow sharp, super quality clippers. For a lifetime.

Review 9: rating 5.0. Well made clipper that works great on cutting toenails straight across Well made clipper that works great on cutting toenails straight across.  If you have problems with ingrown toenails try these.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Where have you been all of my life? I know they are just nail clippers but, WOW! I am very pleased with the quality and construction. The brushed or matte finish is a very nice design feature. It will allow you to keep the clippers under control due to the non slip texture. If you are looking for some wonderful nail clippers, these are the one. I wish I gad seen these years ago.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Throw away your "dime store" clippers Don't waste your time and money on cheapo clippers.  These have sharp blades, are made of strong stainless steel, and cut hard nails easily.

Review 12: rating 5.0. Everyone needs one of these. "This is something I've wanted forever and didn't even know it existed. Now I don't have great crescent shaped chunks clipped out of my toenails. Good, sturdy mechanics too. Will purchase again when I lose this one! "

Review 13: rating 5.0. Quality These work really well and feel hefty, like they are quality.

Review 14: rating 5.0. so when I saw these I thought how perfect! All four of them loved them I'm always looking for stocking stuffers for my husband and three grown sons, so when I saw these I thought how perfect!  All four of them loved them, their sharp, strong, and easy to handle.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Great clippers Great clippers. Bought for my husband for Christmas. He just used them tonight and said they were the best clippers he ever had! Very top quality.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Five Stars Nice clippers. Straight edge. Sturdy. I would recommend. Worth spending a little extra to get a nice pair.

Review 17: rating 5.0. Perfect for thick nails My husband has thick toe nails and so he loves this! So easy to use!

Review 18: rating 5.0. The wide handle provides a good surface for control Works very well.  Spring pressure is adequate to open the clipper but not so strong that it diminishes sensitivity.  The wide handle provides a good surface for control.
persona: This customer prioritizes superior craftsmanship and tactile experience in grooming tools, seeking products that exceed expectations in design, balance, and usability, and is willing to pay for high-quality, well-engineered items that feel exceptional in hand.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Can't imagine a superior model of nail-clippers It's sometimes hard to tell from small web photos just how a product will look and feel for real. The amazon picture for this clipper did look quite appealing, but I can say that in real life the item's quality is even higher than I'd been expecting. Really excellently designed weight and shape for a man's medium-size hands; perfectly balanced tension against the blade-closing action; great surface texture for easy gripping and avoidance of dropping during use. I especially like the wider-than-usual outer end of the push-lever--it doesn't slip away from under your thumb.But the best part is how this clipper cuts through any sort of nails "like butter"--smoothly, so so easily. I can now trim my nails in half the time it used to take, and I no longer need to "smooth out" small sharp corners of nail that I used to get because of how the the whole instrument (older, smaller clippers I had) would move during the cutting action. It's very hard to find *any* purely straight-bladed nail clippers (which I find far more versatile than the curved ones) either online or in stores, and among the few available on amazon, I am convinced these can't be beat. The "pro" in its name is entirely appropriate.Note 1: When you first unpack this product, the gap between the two cutting edges might not seem as wide as you might like, particularly for larger toenails, but then it opens to a better size when you get the push-lever handle up.Note 2: This is my unvarnished and uncompensated opinion. The company did send me a very polite email a few days after I got the product, urging me to write a review, but not for any sort of consideration. I recommend them without reservation.

Review 1: rating 5.0. They Do Exactly What They Say They Will Do They do exactly what they say they will do. One of the white ends have broke off already, but its not essential to the product working. I have used them in my daughter's hair and they left her hair really curly. I would buy them again.

Review 2: rating 2.0. Two Stars Doesn't work for my hair.

Review 3: rating 1.0. Sorry but these don't work I was hoping for a way to add curl to my hair without using heat.These are very slick and don't grab your hair at all. And when you get your hair wrapped around it and try to twist the roller to stay in place, they often fall down or out completely because of their weight. Plus they don't twist easily. They are too thick to hold up with bobby pins to keep them from falling. Essentially this was a waste of $$.

Review 4: rating 1.0. These do not bend or hold well at all. Wouldn't stay ... These did not hold my hair at all without using bobby pins. I have thin fine hair and they constantly fell out, even with using hairspray. I would return it but by the time i was able to really give it a try, it was passed my my return option.

Review 5: rating 5.0. knowing it's bad for my hair I've never tried these before and I'm always using flat irons, knowing it's bad for my hair. Listen...I use these overnight, sometimes for a few hours..I take them out and it looks as if I used the world's most PERFECT curler. These are my favorite things to use. Love em.

I also tried it with both wet and dry hair.  The hair wrapping goes pretty quickly because there are no fasteners or clips to worry about.  That was a key factor in my decision to try these. You just roll up the hair from the bottom...

Review 13: rating 2.0. But for anything else they are pretty worthless. They do not stay in the hair ... These may work if you have long hair-shoulder length or longer.  But for anything else they are pretty worthless. They do not stay in the hair and so do not work.

persona: This customer prioritizes long-term durability and consistent performance, consistently repurchasing products that meet their reliability standards despite limited usage frequency, and values functional consistency over novelty or additional features.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Lasted almost 8 years with 2 uses per day This won't be much of a review. I bought this on October 17, 2007 here on Amazon and must've skipped reviewing it. The good news is: It has been used at least twice a day since October 17, 2007. The bad news: It just stopped charging yesterday, June 24, 2015. I'm back to buy a replacement one and thought I would post this review. I consider myself a fairly simple man and will be trying to find a new model with the features this one has. I'm already leaning towards the Oral-B Pro-3000. Very impressive lifespan on this one and I'll have to just hope my next one lasts as long as this one. I remember when I bought this one. I couldn't believe an electric toothbrush would make that much difference, but it has. I'm planning on overnight shipping the next one just so I don't have to wait to have my electric toothbrush. I follow a pretty basic mouth cleaning process of: Full two minutes with the electric toothbrush as soon as I get out of bed. Two to three light brushings in the afternoon to evening. Then I used the electric toothbrush before going to bed, followed by a once over with my wife's water irrigation pick. I'll probably regret saying this, but I'm 40 now and haven't had a cavity since my mid-20s and while I gave up on the gleaming white smile, I'm still very happy to have made it this far without any dental problems. I credit this toothbrush for a lot of my oral health.
