Review 2: rating 3.0. Nice product Cute great price love that’s there’s a variety of scents. Only reason I don’t give it 5 starts was because one pen seemed to be opened and made a mess in the box. So all pens were sticky

Review 3: rating 5.0. Great for thank you bags I love them and my customers have been excited to get them!

Review 4: rating 5.0. All 10 pens in box-nothing wrong with any-they really help dry skin and nails Love these cuticle oils.  10 in the box and they all smell good-work great!

Review 5: rating 5.0. Nice product First impression: love these oil pens! They smell great and they feel good applying to my cuticles. Perfect size for my gift baskets

Review 6: rating 5.0. Value for money and worth recommending. I usually have a lot of dead skin on my hands, so this can moisturize my hand skin. I think it is very good. After applying the hand cream, use this to apply the edge of the nail. The effect is still very good. More moisturized.

Review 7: rating 1.0. Not as expected... Arrived late, almost all of the tubes were leaking or had a broken seal and oil leaked everywhere....

Review 8: rating 3.0. Questionable Ingredients On the box packaging, the ingredients claim to be: safflower oil, sesame oil, natural keratin, vitamin a, vitamin d, vitamin b5, vitamin e, grape seed oil, silk procaine, thymol, BHA. But on the oil vials, it says that the main ingredient is palm oil. Palm oil is very bad for the environment and I probably won't be buying this again. This product also is not vegan which I forgot to check before purchasing.

Review 9: rating 4.0. No fruit scents 😫 I really like the cuticle oil. My only complaint there were suppose to be 10 scents and I only received the flowery ones, which I don’t like.

Review 10: rating 5.0. Super cute! Super convienient! Perfect giveaway for my clients! So sleek looking and perfect to keep in your purse!

Review 11: rating 5.0. Good stuff Good stuff, easy to use, nails grow much better when using this product.

Review 12: rating 1.0. Opened and leaking. 7 of them are very leaky/ look used and like opened. I am so sad about that because I wanted to use these as gifts.

Review 13: rating 2.0. Not the best This product did not help, dried out my cuticles even more, would not recommend.

Review 14: rating 1.0. Scents are mislabeled. These would be great if they were the right scents. The cherry and the rose are the exact same scent (rose), the lavender and blueberry are the same scents (lavender), and the jasmine and lily are the same (jasmine, I think). So they have mixed up their vats of oils and I'm highly disappointed because the ones I bought this for are the fruity scented ones... They are for nail kits for a little girls birthday party and the flower scents are not right for what I ...

Review 15: rating 2.0. One came completely empty One came completely empty. Not sure if it leaked out of was defective from the manufacturer.  The packaging is completely dry so it wasn’t during transport and none of the oils are labeled as to what scent they are so you’ll have to play a guessing game. I haven’t tried them yet, just pulled them out of the package.

Review 16: rating 5.0. Great product! I used these in my Mani Essentials Bag for my customers!! I love the packaging they are so compact you can easily fit them in your purse!!

Review 17: rating 5.0. Good product I use these as gifts for my business. My customers love them!

Review 18: rating 3.0. Disappointing About a third of my cuticle pens came leaking. I use them as ‘free gift with purchase’ for my business, and couldn’t use those. Disappointed.

Review 19: rating 1.0. Leaking Oils came leaking in box. Smelled nice tho.

Review 20: rating 1.0. Don't Work All of them broke when trying to turn for oil to push out. Doesn't work as it should.
persona: This customer values appealing product aesthetics and pleasant sensory experiences, with a willingness to overlook minor functional flaws if the overall impression is positive and the scent or appearance is satisfying.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Buy ! The best !!!! Smells great too

reviews:
Review 1: rating 4.0. Recommend! This is a lovely cleanser. Light and slightly runny, not highly foaming. I have normal to dry skin and Super Detox leaves my skin feeling fresh but not dry. I love the citrusy essential oils. The natural ingredients make it feel very high-end. Don't let the simple packaging fool you.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Fantastic for oil prone skin. I love this product. I have super oily skin and very large pores. I have used countless other products (proactiv, clean and clear, neutrogena, ect) and they have been helpful. But I have always wanted to find something equally helpful that was not as chemically harsh. This completely fits the bill. My skin feels totally clean but not dried out after I wash and it stays feeling that way for at least as long as the other chemical based products if not long...

Review 3: rating 3.0. ok, but nothing special for the price This is NOT a bad product, in fact it is quite nice. However my skin did not feel any different or cleaner than it does after I use my usual organic cleansers that costs half the price. I found it quite curious that the 4  5 Star reviews are written by people that only reviewed products by this company, seems a little fishy to me. Having said that, if money is no object, this is a nice cleanser, but there are others that do the job just as well a...

Review 4: rating 3.0. Just received I was a bit surprised at how small the bottle was, especially for $24, but I guess the description did say 4.3 oz, so I should have paid more attention. I received the cleanser today, immediately washed my face and here's what I found: It has a pleasant fragrance, a bit minty. It does not lather, but spreads fairly evenly over the face, without needing a lot of product; a lot goes a long way. My face feels very clean, and does not feel as though any residue was left beh...

Review 5: rating 5.0. Add this to your skin care regimen I never heard of charcoal removing toxins from your body, so I was surprised to come across this product while researching natural facial washes. Upon reading some of the reviews I took it upon myself to do some reading on charcoal and its properties. I felt what I read along with some of the reviews convinced me enough to make a purchase. I'm not going to lie, I was skeptical but the way my cheeks have been riddled with blackheads I figured I had n...

Review 6: rating 5.0. Skin has improved Im half way through my first bottle and have stumbled upon a product I'll never be without. I've never been one to try a lot of products, just used purpose liquid face soap for the last 20 years. This stuff has improved my skin, smells incredible and a little goes a long way. My pores appear smaller as they are clean for the first time ever. Love it.

Review 7: rating 5.0. I honestly love it! So far I have been using this cleanser for 4 months now. It has kept my skin clear of breakouts. It actually has stayed clear for the 4 months that I have been using it. I definetly recommend to everyone to at least try once.

Review 8: rating 3.0. Good cleanser, but too watery I have combination skin (with oily T-zone area) and live in a hot, humid climate. I like my pores to be deeply cleansed but not to the extent that my skin gets dry and tight after a wash.This cleanser does a good job of cleaning and has no harmful/harsh chemicals, but it doesn't give me the totally clean, exfoliated yet 'just-right' feeling that my Dr. Alkatis cleanser does.Perhaps it's because it's too watery or because it has essential oils or somethin...

Review 9: rating 4.0. decent I really liked the way this smelled - very floral with a slight hint of orange.  In fact, it's one of the best smelling cleansers I've bought.  However, I didn't really notice any visible difference after using it.  (A few times, I would even break out). I have combination skin and it affects the parts of my face differently. It doesn't seem to strip all the oils from my nose, but at the same time, the other sections of my face could get very dry if I didn't put on a moisturiz...

Review 10: rating 2.0. Watered down product MMMM..this would be a great product if it was not watered down. It is a very thin consistency which I assume is done to save money but really...its water thin and just drips off my face. I do not feel it gets anything clean and I have to use so much at one time. Overpriced and not a good product in general. I would stick with Origins brand before buying this if I was you!

Review 11: rating 2.0. Not what I expected Although it is not a bad wash, I would not consider this a daily wash. It does not foam and toner cleansin after wash clearly shows that it does not clean as much as it should. The bottle is very small and the product is overpriced for what it really delivers. This also smells like some herb, I'm not sure what excatly. Overall, not a bad product but too pricey for what it does not deliver. I went through it in two weeks.

Review 12: rating 3.0. Broke my face out I love the smell and the feel of this, unfortunately it broke my face out. I was sodisappointed, used it about 2 months, when I stopped my face cleared up. Willgive it to someone since I think it was just me. I'm 59 and usually don't get breakouts.

Review 13: rating 4.0. Love that it's natural. This is a great product for the fact that it does not contain a ton of chemicals.  I got tired for putting this acid or that acid or alcohol on my face and wanted to find something that would work well but not overwork my skin.  I have oily skin and susceptible to breakouts and have large pores.  I was reading articles and searching for many products and found this.  While it is very thin and will NOT foam, it can and will do a great job of getting the stuff o...

Review 14: rating 1.0. complete waste of money This product is nothing special for the money .I thought I would give this product a try ,simply because it sounded  cool ,since it had activated charcoal  in it.I have nice skin in the beginning but I do have a little break outs here and there do to my pregnancy.  I haven't noticed any results and what is it suppose  to do again? Don't waste your money on this product.

Review 15: rating 5.0. Great Product This is a very very high quality product. It is loaded with botanical extracts. I just started using it and I can tell that it is very good for my skin.

Review 16: rating 2.0. Didnt work for me I purchased this product based on a recommendation from my friend. it works good for them but terribly for me a found it very iterating and drying as well as expensive. comes in a very tiny bottle for the price, the only reason I gave it 2 stars instead of 1 is because I know it worked well for my friend, but was a total waste on my end,

Review 17: rating 5.0. Crazy cool; Respect! I love that I don't have any pstimple popping with this... which has been a catalyst for severe acne problems I have used this for over two weeks and I will never go back.. I use an oil treatment to moisturize.

Review 18: rating 3.0. ok this stuff is ok. like the organic ingredients but dunno if it is worth $26 for this little bottle. Granted, you don't need a lot to scrub your face. It does like to run out of your hand on the way to your face. lol  the first couple of times i used it, i had new acne the next day. But I think the key is to rinse thoroughly...

Review 19: rating 5.0. Great Product I really like this one.  I do feel like it really gets my skin super clean.  Clears out the clogged pores and does it with natural ingredients.

Review 20: rating 2.0. Not a fan of this cleaner Was not worth the money as it didn't do much and is very runny for a cleanser.  Not a fan
persona: This customer prioritizes effective, high-performing skincare products with a pleasant, feminine scent, and values consistency and positive results over price, often recommending products they trust based on experience.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Healthy Face I have used a product similar that caused nothing but problems but this product works great. Super cleans my face and rids me of any bad stuff forming. I would highly recommend!

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Five Stars Love this and will reorder soon.

Review 2: rating 4.0. This one has a nice fresh scent and it works all day This Deoderant is aluminum free, and it actually works! Most "natural" deodorants only work for me for a short period, and with any exercise or strenuous activity I smell musty. This one has a nice fresh scent and it works all day.

Review 3: rating 4.0. Love the fresh smell Love the fresh smell. REALLY Love that it is aluminum free! It doesn't seem to have any antipersperant properties, and I don't like that it is a roll on, but I'll suffer since it doesn't have aluminum.

Review 4: rating 4.0. Four Stars I love it! It doesn't stop you from sweating but there is no odor.

Review 5: rating 4.0. Allow Time to Dry This does a nice job preventing odor, but is very "wet" feeling - make sure to allow time to dry before dressing.

Review 6: rating 5.0. It is hard to find a good aluminum free deodorant but this one is amazing It is hard to find a good aluminum free deodorant but this one is amazing! Love the smell and coverage. I wasn't sure about the roll-on style but I love it. I will buy this again.

Review 7: rating 1.0. Not sure any deodorant without Aluminum actually works... It smells great when you first wear it but soon after it doesn't do it's job. Also depending on the type of fabric you are wearing, it stains the clothes. As much as I was hoping this one would work it doesn't. Desperately looking for a deodorant without Aluminum that truly works.

Review 8: rating 3.0. Three Stars love the scent but does not work as well as other deodorants I have used

Review 9: rating 2.0. Doesn't work well The first few weeks, it worked great.  I suspect that was because either my old antiperspirant was still working or it was still winter.  Whatever the reason, it is no longer working now.  It works a few hours at best.  I find that I have to wipe my underarms and reapply throughout the day or I stink.  I suspect those individuals who rated this deodorant highly probably did so in the first day or week they used the product.

Review 10: rating 1.0. Well the smell is nice but it makes me stink worse than not wearing ... Well the smell is nice but it makes me stink worse than not wearing any at all. It lasts like 10 minutes and then I smell really bad. Also I was quite irritated when I received the package the bottle itself was wrapped in multiple stickers with bar codes on them. They covered the actual lable of the product and the adhesive on the stickers was so strong I couldn't get them off and it was very gooey. So I had stic...

Review 11: rating 5.0. Aluminum-free and actually works! Looks like I finally found an aluminum-free deodorant that actually works! The scent is very fresh, not overpowering at all, and even after an intense yoga session, I still smell great. I just don't get why this has to ship all the way from Germany and isn't sold in the States! Because it is a little pricey. But I'll keep buying, since I wasn't able to find anything even close here on this side of the Pond.

Review 12: rating 2.0. Two Stars Takes a while to dry and looses it's effectiveness after a few hours

Review 13: rating 1.0. Zero, null, schlecht... Don't buy! This product arrived with tags all around, stating it's origin (Germany) and name of importer in Ca. Ok. However, the disappointing part is that the cap has a yellow tag with big blue letters (see pics.), words in 2 languages, both which I know mean "free sample" (in Spanish "gratis", and in German "testen"), with an asterisk next to these, a statement bellow which says something like "sale prohibited", in German lang...

Review 14: rating 4.0. This is my favorite deodorant without aluminum This is my favorite deodorant without aluminum. I have tried many. It smells fresh and light - I generally buy unscented everything so finding a deodorant without an overpowering scent was important to me.  It does a decent job of masking smell on normal days. I reapply on 100 degree days.

Review 15: rating 5.0. smells great, aluminum-free feels fresh, smells great, aluminum-free. wish they sold them in the us

Review 16: rating 5.0. Deodorant that actually works with lovely glass container This really works!  It's not an antiperspirant, so while though I sweat on hot days, there is no smell at all!!I love that it's aluminum free and it doesn't stain my clothes like some 'natural' coconut oil deodorants.The product is in glass and is beautifully designed - as far as deodorants go. Worth the cost.

Review 17: rating 2.0. Perfumed This product might be effective and not contain aluminum, but it has a perfume scent which I wasn't aware of or wouldn't have purchased. Not for the chemically sensitive.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Amazing on my super sensitive skin I have problems with all and any deodorant (including primal pit paste and any crystal type deodorants). I have been using this one for a few weeks now, and no itching, no redness, no discomfort at all. It seems I finally have found my deodorant . . .

Review 19: rating 5.0. Works well It works really well but takes awhile to dry cuz it goes on really wet. It has a nice scent.

Review 20: rating 4.0. Great for people allergic to aluminum I recently had to switch from regular Dove stray deodorant because of the discoloration it was causing. I have been using this for about almost 2 months. I cannot tell if it is helping the discoloration, but I do like the smell. It doesn't last as long but you can get through the day. Sometimes a second application is needed but you should clean the area. I use a medicated wipe. You just need to get rid of the bacteria before add in more or it'll...
persona: This customer values product effectiveness and performance, particularly for daily use, and is willing to overlook minor drawbacks like short duration if the product delivers reliable results; they prioritize functionality and are influenced by product authenticity and quality over brand or seller reputation, and appreciate practical usage tips that enhance efficiency and resource conservation.
reference_output: rating 4.0. Natural DEODORant I wish it lasted a little longer but it's still good for everyday use -- I'm not certain how this would work for someone who is a profuse sweater. (TIP: *always* wear an undershirt for protection against sweat stains)

reviews:
Review 1: rating 2.0. Not at all what I expected This wasn't at all what I expected.  There are 2 manual tools to use for scraping and a hand held mirror.  As for the electric part, it doesn't really do anything.  I will concede that maybe I misunderstood the whole purpose of this tool but it wasn't at all what I was expecting.

Review 2: rating 1.0. It didn’t work for me! It did nit remove my plague!

Review 3: rating 1.0. Very good tooth vibrator While you can use it to gouge and pry plaque off your teeth... I still had to go get my teeth cleaned.

Review 4: rating 1.0. Waste of time and money, does not performs the job as it should I ordered the product after reading a few reviews how great it is but after using that for a while I feel like it's not up to the mark. I find 2 major flaws with the product, it does not performs the job it describes. The vibrations it makes are not strong enough to break the plaque. I have very mild plaque behind the lower two teeth but I was not able to remove it.  The mirror came along is impractical for self use and ...

Review 5: rating 3.0. Caused us headaches from vibration The shape is well designed and the mirror helps show the back of teeth. But neither my husband or I can use it more than a couple of short sessions without getting headaches. 60 seconds max contact and I had to stop. He experienced the same.

Review 6: rating 1.0. Doesn't do anything I don't see how this would possibly work. The metal part is rounded and dull, it also doesn't move at all. So it's just a vibrating piece of metal. Not sure how this is supposed to do anything? These other reviews have to be fake?

Review 7: rating 5.0. Comes with all the tools you need I haven't been to the dentist in the last few years and graciously still have dodged cavities, but have some plaque build up in between my teeth. Because of this, my teeth weren't looking as white as they once were. I went to school for dental hygiene like 10 years ago and all I can say is this is the perfect "at home solution."

Review 8: rating 5.0. A dental visit at home. Amazing! This set of dental tools for at home is honestly amazing. I was hesitant from reviews but it does work great. I have some not awful but still bad calculus build up on my teeth. The calculus remover with little effort got the majority off the front of my bottom teeth that most bugged me. I used the metal tools to scrape a bit of the harder stuff on the front. Then I’d go back over it with the tool. Even more impressive was what it did on the inside of ...

Review 9: rating 1.0. Don't waste your money Unfortunately this tool does absolutely nothing but vibrates. My toothbrush does more!!!

Review 10: rating 1.0. Product DOES NOT remove dental calculus. DO NOT PURCHASE. WASTE OF FUNDS. Completely disappointed with this product. The dental calculus remover did not work after hours of use. The separate dental tools provided did work but this product DOES NOT remove stains, hard calculus build up. DO NOT WASTE YOUR MONEY. Returning ASAP.

Review 11: rating 5.0. It really works! I bought three different plaque/calculus removers, not knowing which one would work best, and opened this one first because it was the least expensive with the highest rating.  The other two will be returned unopened!  The Meeteasy removed stains and plaque near the gum lime and back of my teeth in less than 15 minutes - I could feel the difference running my tongue against my teeth.  I keep it on my desk and use it when my hands are free - it's lightweight, quiet an...

Review 12: rating 2.0. Don't buy I purchased this and was quite excited about getting it. Until I opened the box. The box itself was very nice, but when I opened it it looked like it had already been opened previously. I just put the lid back on and returned it. I really don't know if it is a good product or not, because I didnt get a chance to use it. I am not going to use something that possibly has been used by someone else. Especially with teeth. No thank you.

Review 13: rating 5.0. Highly recommend! Got it 1.5 year ago and it works perfectly so far.  Cleans my calculus in a minute anytime I want - no need to wait until my routine dental cleaning.The battery life is surprisingly good.  I usually recharge it like every few months.

Review 14: rating 1.0. Waste of money. All vibration and does not so anything. Go see your dentist to get proper treatment!

Review 15: rating 2.0. A gimmick product. I did everything I was suppose to do but the pick seems more like a gimmick than something that actually helps with callus. Just felt like it was massaging my teeth and I didn’t want to be too aggressive with it because I didn’t want to destroy my tooth enamel or chip them. I don’t have a lot of callus at all but the two I do have didn’t budge.

Review 16: rating 1.0. Not so great Doesn't remove anything. The only thing it does is makes your teeth sore. Go to a professional unfortunately this diy doesn't work.

Review 17: rating 1.0. Not enough time! We keep getting some products with just a day or two after receiving for an evaluation . Not enough time to evaluate!

Review 18: rating 1.0. Does not even remove plaque The electric feature is not strong enough to remove plaque all it does is vibrate. What removes it is the other mechanical tool that you can get at the dollar store and pluck out the plaque. 1/10 product

Review 19: rating 5.0. Great product It is very easy to use and it works great. Would highly recommend this product to anyone!

Review 20: rating 5.0. Worth the money I'm happy with my purchase it definitely got rid of the stubborn plaque on my bottom teeth definitely worth the money
persona: This customer values high-performance, reliable products that deliver consistent results over time, prioritizes long-term value and effectiveness over price, and is willing to invest in quality items that enhance daily well-being and reduce future costs—while being highly sensitive to product failure or poor durability.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Plaque finder This tool is very effective at cleaning between teeth and at the gum line.  Even after flossing I experience this tool to find left over plaque.  I am 69 yrs old and clean teeth and heathy gums are critical to staying healthy overall. I use it about once a week and I get very good checkups with no need to deep clean for exorbitant amounts of money at the dentist office. This is a very good investment on several levels.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Excellent when used correctly :) This is amazing. I've been using it as a primer for my majorlica majorca fiber lash mascara. It really helps my lashes. Mascara removal is so much easier now at night; I'm no longer accidentally pulling out my lashes while trying to clean my face!To apply, you only need to barely blink your lashes on the brush. A very light hand is needed. Your lashes shouldn't be covered in the white primer. I think the other reviewers who had issues with this produc...

Review 2: rating 1.0. Not a good conditioner This primer did not condition or strengthen my lashes. One morning, all the ends just broke off! Going back to Chanel mascara base and waiting for my lashes to regrow. Ugh.

Review 3: rating 1.0. Not too happy with Lash Primer Not happy with this Lash Primer.  The white liquid was caked up on brush.  Continues to be that way.

Review 4: rating 3.0. Claims it dries black not true it dries like you have cold on uour lashes and uou didn't ... Claims  it dries black not true  it dries like you have cold on uour lashes and uou didn't wash face but if u top it with black mascara it's greatI didn't want to use mascara that's y I brought it so it not good for me

Review 5: rating 5.0. Good primer, slightly pricey for off-brand Great lash primer. Works as expected, but I do find it pretty pricey for an off-brand product. I use primers to help build my mascara so I can use less mascara and decrease the time it takes. I do one layer primer, follow with one layer mascara, another layer of primer, finish with another layer of mascara. This builds great volume and it doesn't make the mascara flake off or anything. I don't wait for it to dry between layers just FYI. I'm ...

Review 6: rating 3.0. but nothing great enough to write home about Does not irritate my eyes,  Adds a little extra "umph" to your lashes, but nothing great enough to write home about...

Review 7: rating 3.0. It's ok - not better than Lancome It does not work better than the Lancome primer.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Love Love, Love, Love this primer! I apply it first and then apply mascara immediately after. It makes my eyelashes look so long!Update: been using the same primer for 7 months and it's still works like a charm! The picture is kind of awkward, but that's the only way to show how long my lashes are!! Just placed a second order and I will continue to use this as long as they make it! 👍

Review 9: rating 2.0. Not Impressed Didn't notice any big difference that made it worth the extra effort and money.

Review 10: rating 1.0. I LOST 17 LASHES IN ONE USE. This product was awful! It made my lashes brittle and dry. My final straw was when I lost 17 lashes in one eye alone. YES, I COUNTED! I was horrified![[ASIN:B00VKOHS2I Lash Primer by Radiant Complex I Best Eyelash and Eyebrow Conditioner to Enhance and Prime Mascara!]] Record breaker. NEVER again. I have returned to my Jane Iredale.This experience taught me to never trust certain reviews.

Review 11: rating 5.0. Must-have for any make-up bag I am not sure how I used to apply mascara before getting this item, it goes on very smoothly, dries quickly, I usually apply it as the last part of my make-up routine right before apply black mascara. It makes your lashes look longer and fuller even if you don't add a colored mascara on top of it but I usually prefer to. Have been using it for 2 months now with no problems or irritation. I highly recommend this item and this seller and will be buying it ...

Review 12: rating 1.0. Too Thick, Not Worth $ This product is too thick.  It doesn't go on well and is way overpriced.  I found the L'Oreal Paris Voluminous Superstar works 100 times better and is much cheaper.

Review 13: rating 3.0. It's OK Helps - but wish it would add more length.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Love it so much! I love my lash primer! I put it on after using my eyelash curler...I apply it just like mascara...make sure I keep brushing until the clumps are good then immediately apply my $5 mascara and tadah! Long nice lashes! I get compliments all the time by random strangers and I always show them exactly how to order it! I'm on my second tube of it.... It lasts about 2 months and I pay about $19 for it and it's worth EVERY penny!

Review 15: rating 5.0. Loveee this primer Love this primer I use every day before my mascara and it makes my lashes super long and lush! I do use two mascaras and latisse and was having a problem with broken lashes before using this product. Excuse my duck face in the pic lol

Review 16: rating 5.0. Love it! Wow!  This makes a huge difference.  My lash's look fake!  Love it!

Review 17: rating 5.0. Works great! I love this!  It works better than any other product I have used.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Great Product--Buy it! I have used several different primers over the years.  They all worked well BUT this one is really Tops.  I have short lashes;however, when using this primer my lashes look long and thick after using mascara.  Great Product!!

Review 19: rating 4.0. Protects Mascara From Smudging Lash primers are difficult to find.  This one was rated higher than most so I ordered it.  I followed the directions and quickly applied mascara after the primer was applied.  Mascara did not smudge and seemed more evenly spread on lashes.  However, the primer itself started to clump on specific lashes.  It is a good, but not excellent product, and the price is reasonable.

Review 20: rating 2.0. Not for me For me, this last primer is too thick and globby.  I tried applying it in different ways, but just never liked the way it goes on.  I returned it with no problems from the seller.

reviews:

Review 2: rating 3.0. Jumpy wand curl Love the hair very soft and bouncy. Saving for a special occasion.

Review 3: rating 3.0. Three Stars I like it but it only lasted for about a week.Want buy again

Review 4: rating 3.0. Darker is better Tried the mixed shades with 1b.  1b is longer and smoother.  Will remove the brown/blonde and just go with dark strands.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Product is amazing, tray is not. The entire product is 100% recommended aside from one thing. The plastic case these come in breaks and sharp shades can stick you. Aside from that, the bath bombs are cute, well-made, smell great, add a lot of color and fizz, and don't bother my or my kid's sensitive skin.The pokemon are not officially licensed, which is fine because if they were each bath bomb would be $30. They're still close to the original designs, and no small pieces or other safety issues.I understand how hard it can be to keep costs down when selling handmade products, but I hope the seller can find some other trays or similar packaging that doesn't splinter. I have to move these immediately from the tray to avoid cutting my fingers every week (kid gets one per week). Other than that, absolutely amazing product, 100% recommended.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Who Ever Is Listening.......... I am 58. I have been accused of being my son's girlfriend -- solely on the basis of my skin. I have been using La Prairie Cellular Radiance for the last nine years. I am a registered nurse -- it was another RN who introduced me to La Prairie via a fabulous Nordstrom facial special. Many times, I have tried different, cheaper, well-known and less effective moisturizers; all with the result of minor to major breakouts. Then I saw a review of AHA Souffle on MakeUpAlley.com and sent for the cheapest jar. I started to use it after my shower and before my La Prairie Cellular Radiance Cream. What a miraculous cream. NEVER has my skin looked this fabulous. No wrinkles, my age spots are fading (they used to be cute little freckles), and acne scars are fading fast.

reference_output: rating 1.0. Not Good... I really wanted to like this moisturizer, but I just can't.  First of all, it smells funky - like I'm putting salad dressing on my face.  I like a lot of InstaNatural products, so I didn't want to give such a bad review, but this heavy, smelly cream just doesn't work!  Secondly, it contains beeswax, a known comedogenic ingredient that doesn't belong in a facial moisturizer. Being a skin care junkie, I would've tolerated the smell, and greasy feel if it was beneficial for my skin. However, after using it for a week with no results, and even a few minor breakouts, I tossed it in the trash.

reference_output: rating 5.0. Very effective for dry skin and Psoriasis I have very dry skin and Psoriasis and this helps so much. I purchased it in the tubes first then went back for this larger container, even though I only have to use a small amount I use it daily so a larger container is a better buy. reference_output: rating 5.0. Very good for eyes irritations or eyes fatigue This product is called Optrex, it is a French brand that has specialized in eyes care for decades. This product is great if you need an eye bath; the 16oz bottle contains among other ingredients cornflower water that is known to relief eye irritations or fatigue for example.  If you use computers a lot then it is good to pour a little bit of it on a coton  to let it then rest on your eyes for 10 or 15 min before sleeping. It really relaxes you.  It is good in case of dust or particles in your eyes too. You need to know that once opened this product has a limited life of 4 weeks  and it should be conserved at a temp inferior to 77 F.

persona: This customer prioritizes high-performance, reliable grooming products and values a consistent, high-quality shaving experience; they are loyal to proven standards, willing to overlook minor design limitations if the core functionality excels, and prefer products that integrate seamlessly into a routine with minimal hassle.
reference_output: rating 5.0. THE Standard in premium shaving I've tried at least a dozen shave soaps, maybe two dozen.  MWF is my go-to, standard. I leave it in a shave bowl in a drawer.  I rinse my brush and then swirl the dripping wet brush on top of the soap.  In about 20 seconds, you have phenomenal lather.  Wet and repeat for more water if needed. Lather around your face further as needed.  I often do this, then take a shower and repeat the lathering when I get out of the shower, and then shave.I have found a few artisan soaps that lather as good, but none better.  Those artisan soaps often come in a variety of delightful fragrances, but I don't care that much about fragrance.  MWF doesn't have much of any fragrance.  In fact after having wet it and let it dry a few dozen times, there is no discernible scent of any kind.  If you like the smell of MWF (or any other shave soap), keep it in a covered container between uses.  I'd suggest for those who like fragrance in their shave soap to just put MWF in a covered container and sprinkle in a little of their favorite cologne a few times and keep it covered and you'll have a $40 artisanal shave soap!I like the ingredients.  It's tallow based which I prefer.  There's lanolin in it which I like.  Although it's not a glycerin based soap, there is a little glycerin in the ingredients - it doesn't seem to be a large amount, so if you really like glycerin, get some vegetable glycerin on Amazon and sprinkle it on top of the soap or add it to your pre-shave.  It doesn't have shea butter in it, so I sometimes keep an open puck of shea butter shave soap in a shave dish next to MWF and occasionally reach down with my brush and lather from both.I've seen some reviews that say that it doesn't lather all that well in "hard" water.  We have moderately hard water in my city and I've never had trouble at all.Finally, it's cheap!  I lather before showering; after showering, and usually a second time while shaving, and my brush is full of lather when I finish and my single puck will last for maybe 300 shaves?? so maybe 4 cents a shave??Also,

reference_output: rating 4.0. Did not survive hot summer days inside the car So I live in desert climate and one of my challenges (poor me, I know!) is that (a) I want to leave a lip balm in my car at all times, in case I forget to bring one from home, and (b) it gets veeeeery hot inside my car during summer times when the car is parked. Usually, if I leave lip balms in the car, they just melt all over the place or, if they stay inside their casing, their consistency changes in a way that they cannot be applied properly anymore to the lips. So I was excited to discover Duke Cannon lip balm, which promises to resist high temperatures. Alas, this one did not survive my car, either. It did not melt out of its case but the texture still disintegrated and made it impossible to properly apply the lip balm. I suppose it gets hotter than 125 degrees inside my car. On the bright side, after this one failed, I tried another Duke Cannon lip balm and that one survived the heat in the car! Here's the link: https://smile.amazon.com/gp/product/B01JDF9WEM/ref=oh_aui_detailpage_o07_s01?ie=UTF8&psc=1

persona: This customer values high-performance, durable products that exceed expectations in functionality and design, and is willing to try innovative items based on recommendations, prioritizing quality and effectiveness over price.
reference_output: rating 5.0. It's almost a misnomer to call it a wash cloth. Seeing these as a recommended item on another product page, I did some research, quickly became intrigued, and decided to give them a try. After the first shower (and with every successive shower), all I can say is wow. The nylon material itself is strong, flexible, and durable (the one I'm using is fine after 2 months). The design/weave of the material allows me to build up a good lather, even with low-lather body washes. Unlike a loofah or bath puff, the length of the wash cloth gives the ability to reach difficult areas, like the full length of the back. Finally, the level of exfoliation is just enough: my skin (which can be pretty sensitive) definitely felt smooth and exfoliated, but there was no irritation or sensitivity, which can sometimes occur with more harsh exfoliating products. Considering what this wash cloth can do, don't waste your money on scrubs or loofahs.

persona: This customer prioritizes product performance and functionality over convenience, willing to invest time for effective results but expects tangible outcomes; they are skeptical of beauty trends and value practicality, often comparing products to established tools, and are likely to return items that fail to meet performance expectations despite quality construction.
reference_output: rating 5.0. Love this wand! I'm not going to lie and say using this particular wand was not time consuming...it definitely was, but the results are worth it.  I have very long hair, so wrapping was a bit of a struggle because the wand is only so long.  I was able to wrap around both the balls and the indents, giving a unique curl effect.  Works best to physically unwrap the strand of hair you're curling rather than pulling downward as with a traditional clipless wand.  Any reviews stating this wand does not give curl either has too short of hair, isn't using a high enough heat setting, or is completely doing it wrong.  You really need to use your right hand over your head to curl the left and vice versa for the right.  The black cool tip should be pointing downward as you curl.  There are some informative videos on YouTube for how to curl with this wand.  Anyhow, I'm pleased with this wand and look forward to many great looks from it.

reference_output: rating 5.0. HOLY. MOLY. HOLY. GRAIL. Wow. As someone with a skinny eyebrow shape and yet thicker hairs on my eyebrows, it’s been hard for me to shop for eyebrow products my entire life. I’ve tried everything from the beloved Anastasia’s to higher end brands like Tom Ford and Charlotte Tillbury, even drugstore products and Japanese and Korean products and I think I’ve finally found my holy grail. This kept on me all day at work, even though I had to walk for a good distance in the rain to my car. It didn’t smudge or budge a bit for the entirety of my day and I’ve NEVER had a product that wasn’t eaten up by my weird eyebrows or completely disappeared. This product did it all. A little goes a long way, and the best part was it was so easy to get a natural and defined eyebrow shape that didn’t go over the top or too heavy either. I will be buying all my eyebrow products from them from now on. Best $9 I ever spent.

reviews:
Review 1: rating 5.0. Caruso Steam Unit Would not use any other unit or type of heating for my hair.  This makes the curles stay in and is so easy to use!  I had lots of rollers, the original steamer finally broke (it was dropped by one of my granddaughters) so I just bought a new one!  Takes up a lot less space than the electric roller sets and much, much easier to use!

Review 2: rating 5.0. CARUSO HAIR CURLER I've been using these daily for years and they always seem to last well (except for one).  I don't know what I'd do without them. My hair benefits from not using electric curling products which dry and burn the hair. These sponge steam rollers are gentle, fast and make your hair soft and shiny. I would recommend them to anyone.

Review 3: rating 5.0. Love this thing I really like the Caruso hairsetter, as this is probably the 5th or 6th one I've gotten. I feel they work better than dry rollers. The only drawback is that after a while they do die so you have to replace them. I've been using these for probably close to 20 years, and as long at they still make them and I have hair, I'll continue to use it.Delivery was a day sooner than promised, always a plus.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Caruso Steam Unit - Only Exactly what I wanted, since I already have a healthy collection of the rollers. I purchased my first unit at the beauty supply store, but they do not offer units only.  With this unit, I am being very diligent in filling with distilled water (we have very hard water and lime build up is terrible) and emptying properly as described in the directions.  I've used Caruso every day for 4 or 5 years and love it!  Excellent delivery service from this vendor.

Review 5: rating 1.0. Unacceptable I have been using Caruso Steam rollers for over 20 years.  The units usually last 2-3 years before needing replacement.  I was thrilled to find that I could order the unit only, because I have enough of the rollers to last a lifetime.  However, this unit barely emits steam.  It needs to warm up for at least 10 minutes and the rollers need to sit for 30-45 seconds each to get completely hot.  I'm a busy girl with little time to fuss with my hair.

Review 6: rating 5.0. Caruso hair steamer I've bought so many of these...it's the only hair curling system I like. They don't damage your hair. The only issue I ever have with these is the clogging up or failing to steam. I still can't remember if you're suppose to use salt in the water or not...it's been awhile since I've used them again. The unit itself is great tho. The only one I would consider using to curl my hair. I've been using Caruso for 25 years.

Review 7: rating 5.0. Awesome. My wife swears by this style and when her old broke she was very upset. Thanks for having these . Awesome

It is also nicely engineered, not too heavy and nice to look at.  Glad I bought this one

persona: This customer values high-performance, salon-quality results at home, prioritizes ease of use and comfort, and is willing to follow precise application guidelines to achieve a professional mirror finish, showing strong preference for reliable, effective products that deliver on their promises.
reference_output: rating 5.0. NOT A FROST!! TRUE MIRROR!! I have had these long enough to test all three colors. I'm satisfied these are clearly NOT frost. If you apply correctly, the mirror effect is better than the powders. However, the gold is more of a gold/green, not a true gold. The silver & rose gold are beautiful.To apply correctly and have the mirror effect, you must adhere to nail tech guidelines!!1. Wash & scrub your nails with a nail brush.2. Dry your nails!3. Apply a base coat. This is VERY important to have a filled in base on your nails. I use Mia's.4. Apply one thin coat to each nail.5. Use a nail corrector pen or small brush dipped in acetone to remove any on cuticles.6. Go back to first nail painted and apply a second, thicker coat. Repeat on other nails.7. Repeat step 5.8. Apply your choice of top coat. I use Mia's in my salon.If you can't get the same results, you're either not putting a base and top coat on or you're using too much on your first coat. Enjoy!!

reference_output: rating 5.0. Wonderfully light and silky, does a good job, smells wonderful too! I have used more expensive facial cleansing oils and not been nearly as happy with them as I am with this product.  First, it is much silkier and lighter than other oils I have used, so that it is much easier to use, absorbs better, and doesn't leave oily spots on my vanity.  One of the nicest things about it is the pleasant smell; smells a little bit like apples.  The other oils I have used did not have a pleasant smell at all; smelled like cooking oil.  And on top of all that, the price on this oil is significantly less expensive than what I was using. Why would I ever go back to paying more when I can buy this oil for less and be much happier with it?  Can't recommend it highly enough.  Just fyi; I am in my fifties, have dry skin, always looking for anti-aging and moisturizing products, but even someone with younger skin would be happy since the oil is so light.

Review 2: rating 5.0. Good Good quality bottles. The plastic spray tubes come extra long so they can be trimmed. The darkness level of the plastic is not too light.

Review 3: rating 4.0. but still would have liked four working spray bottles Ordered arrived with one missing top.  I was given credit for it, but still would have liked four working spray bottles.

Review 4: rating 5.0. Perfect for my needs Recent information from a knowledgeable authority on colloidal silver production and storage inspired me to try PET plastic bottles for application. These bottles were exactly what I needed, and I'm highly pleased with their leakproof tops and dependable sprayers. If I need more (and I probably will) I know where to come.

Review 5: rating 5.0. Five Stars Speedy service. Exactly what I was looking for.

Review 6: rating 4.0. Protects contents from damaging light I keep these by my sink - one with white vinegar and one with hydrogen peroxide, for disinfecting surfaces (especially wooden or bamboo cutting boards).  Turns out, if you use first one, then the other, they mix on the surface to make a pretty darned effective disinfectant, with really benign impacts on humans and the environment.  Because the bottle is dark amber, it gives the hydrogen peroxide some protection from light - especially since I use...

Review 7: rating 5.0. ... my homemade alcohol free hand sanitizer and they work great! The lid stays on in my purse and ... I bought these for my homemade alcohol free hand sanitizer and they work great! The lid stays on in my purse and it's easy to spray on and get just the right amount rather than squeezing out too much of the store bought. I want to make some for gifts but will buy smaller bottles...these hold a lot and it's a little big for a purse.

Review 8: rating 5.0. Five Stars These amber spray bottles are great for mixing up EO's to use as insect repellant or room deodorizer.

Review 9: rating 5.0. I would definitely buy these again if I ever need more Nice bottles. I would definitely buy these again if I ever need more. I wanted to make an ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) and water serum for my skin and one of these bottles worked perfectly for that purpose. Thanks a lot.

Review 10: rating 4.0. So far so good! I've mixed a few oils together in bottles to make room spray & so far they're great! I've gotten bottles in the past that stick from the oils but so far these are perfect. Just wish the top was black instead of white ;)

Review 11: rating 3.0. Pumps started to stick after 2 months In the beginning the pumps and bottles were great.  After a little while, the pumps began to stick.  Will not purchase again

Review 12: rating 5.0. I am very happy with this bottle I am very happy with this bottle, it produces fine mist. I'm about to reorder and definitely recommend everyone looking for fine spray bottles.

Review 13: rating 1.0. One Star I returned the bottles, I cannot use plastic, need to have glass bottles.

Review 14: rating 5.0. Solid Alternative to Commercial Products I bought this because I have started making my own air freshener.  After my daughter's 2 little dogs had seizures from Fabreze aerosol,  I was inspired to explore simple alternatives.  Now I give this to friends and family.  The bottles are perfect for this and inexpensive and I can refill them for people!

Review 15: rating 5.0. Great for making sprays with essential oils. I purchased these bottles to make room sprays with my essential oils.  I really like these bottles!  They are safe for use with essential oils (many plastics are not) because of the PET plastic.  I made up my room sprays and have been very pleased with these bottles.  My only wish is that they had a black (or even brown) nozzle instead of white.I've used several items from Plant Therapy now, and I've been impressed with the quality of thei...

Review 16: rating 1.0. Just ok Mist is not fine enough and pump tends to get stuck

Review 17: rating 5.0. Perfect Spray! These bottles are great!  I was searching for plastic bottles that are safe to use with essential oils and these are the right ones!  I am using them to fill with DIY Poopourri for the bathroom and was just too afraid of using glass bottles that may drop and shatter on the tile floor -- so these are perfect for this use.  I will definitely be purchasing more in the future.

Review 18: rating 5.0. Love them! I am using them to make essential oil sprays Love them! I am using them to make essential oil sprays.  Air Fresheners & Poopourri spray for the bathroom,  and spritzers to carry in my purse.The spray nozzle works well and I have not had any clogging or problems with them.

Review 19: rating 4.0. Pretty good, but I have had problems with my ... Pretty good, but I have had problems with my bottle clogging up.  It is filled with water, witch hazel, and 40 drops of essential oil so I'm not sure why it would clog.  I was going to use these for a spritz-on beard/aftershave oil I was going to make, but I'm a little nervous to sue them now.

Review 20: rating 2.0. Returned I returned this. Inconsistent sprays due to nozzle not pulling and distributing equal amounts.
persona: This customer prioritizes functionality for specific DIY uses like essential oil blends and values product reliability in containment; they are likely to avoid repurchasing if leakage issues persist, indicating a strong preference for leak-proof packaging and consistent performance in practical applications.

persona: This customer prioritizes performance and reliability in beauty products, seeking high-quality results that deliver on promises like volume, length, and smudge-free wear, while also valuing ease of removal and buildable application—willing to pay a premium for effective, long-lasting formulas that perform like luxury products, and appreciates tools that enhance results for special occasions.
reference_output: rating 1.0. Not for me Did not like. It added thickness and darkened my lashes. But it was really clumpy. It went on like a mousse, kind of fluffy. I think thats what made it clump. It also clumped the lashes together besides leaving balls of mascara clumps on the lashes. I hoped for better based on the reviews, but it didn't go on nicely at all. It was sweatproof, yet it did smear over night just a bit. Honestly, it looked exactly the same in the morning as it did when I first applied it, besides the slight smudge under one eye. So I have to say, that's pretty bad to look like you slept in your mascara when it's been freshly applied. Big thumbs down on this one.
